subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses and manifested the clear proofs, and Who hath called all men unto His straight Path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات و دعا الکل الی صراطه المستقیم من الناس
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action
